revision.comment: Disambiguating links to [[Spirit]] (link removed) using [[User:Qwertyytrewqqwerty/DisamAssist|DisamAssist]].
1 revision imported: importing wikipedia
fixing the uncategorized categories error
Adding [[Category:kk]][[category:kk]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{Commons}} {{Cat main}} The '''anthropology of religion''' involves the study of religious institutions in relation to other social institutions, and the comparison of religious beliefs and practices across [[culture]]s. Anthropologists of religion are usually [[cultural anthropology|cultural]] or [[social anthropology|social anthropologists]]. These anthropologists study such things as [[ritual]], [[Mythology|myth]], [[sacred texts]], sacred landscape, [[shamanism]], [[ghost]]s, spirits, [[religion|religious hierarchy]], and so forth.
[[Category:Uncategorized categories]][[Category:Cultural anthropology]] [[Category:Uncategorized categories]][[Category:Social anthropology]] [[Category:Uncategorized categories]][[Category:Religious studies]] [[Category:kk]][[category:kk]]

revision.comment: Removing from [[Category:Kk]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Bot: tidy & size tag (4 members)
Bot: tidy & size tag (3 members)
Bot: remove sole member from [[Category:Social anthropology]]
Bot: tag as Tier 0 category
Bot: confirm enwiki category & retag
Text replacement - "↵↵" to " "
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Text replacement - "[[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]]" to "[[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[category:confirmed enwiki categories]]"
Bot: remove obsolete category Categories with 3 members
Bot: remove obsolete category Confirmed enwiki categories
Bot: tidy cats/IWs; add JA prose & tracking
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page & cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Uncategorized categories
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "==Old Content==↵==" to "=="
Text replacement - "==Old Content==↵==" to "=="
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q8255423)
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
Text replacement - "{{draft categories|↵↵}}" to ""
revision.text:
==Old Content== {{Commons}} {{Cat main}} The '''anthropology of religion''' involves the study of religious institutions in relation to other social institutions, and the comparison of religious beliefs and practices across [[:en:Culture|Culture]]s. Anthropologists of religion are usually [[:en:Cultural anthropology|cultural]] or [[:en:Social anthropology|social anthropologists]]. These anthropologists study such things as [[:en:Ritual|Ritual]], [[:en:Myth|myth]], [[:en:sacred texts|sacred texts]], sacred landscape, [[:en:Shamanism|Shamanism]], [[:en:Ghost|Ghost]]s, spirits, [[:en:Religion|religious hierarchy]], and so forth.
==Categories==
[[en:Category:Anthropology of religion]] {{wikidata link|Q8255423}} [[Category:categories missing wikidata]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Cultural anthropology]] [[Category:Original categories]] [[Category:Religious studies]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{wikidata link|" to "[[Category:Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata]]{{Wikidata link|"
revision.text:
==Old Content== {{Commons}} {{Cat main}} The '''anthropology of religion''' involves the study of religious institutions in relation to other social institutions, and the comparison of religious beliefs and practices across [[:en:Culture|Culture]]s. Anthropologists of religion are usually [[:en:Cultural anthropology|cultural]] or [[:en:Social anthropology|social anthropologists]]. These anthropologists study such things as [[:en:Ritual|Ritual]], [[:en:Myth|myth]], [[:en:sacred texts|sacred texts]], sacred landscape, [[:en:Shamanism|Shamanism]], [[:en:Ghost|Ghost]]s, spirits, [[:en:Religion|religious hierarchy]], and so forth.

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "Categories missing wikidata" to "Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata"
